name: Grilled Swordfish with Citrus Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3 corn tortillas, cut into 1-inch thick strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Season the swordfish steaks with Creole spice, salt, and pepper.
3. Place the fish on the grill.
4. Heat a fryer or deep pan of oil to medium-high heat.
5. Fry the tortilla strips in batches until crispy (about 3 minutes).
6. Drain the strips on paper towels and season with salt and pepper.
7. In a small bowl, combine orange sections, lemon sections, lime sections, shallots, olive oil, honey, and cilantro. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Remove the fish from the grill when it reaches your desired doneness.
9. Arrange a nest of crispy tortilla strips on the platter.
10. Place the grilled swordfish steaks on top of the nest.
11. Spoon the citrus salsa over the fish.
Note: Do not overcrowd the fryer or pan when frying the tortillas to ensure they become crispy and crumbly, providing a suitable base for the fish.
